s1.ptxt: Connect SUZUKI scan tool or CAN communication OBD generic scan tool (Euro-OBD model) to DLC in the same manner as when making this connection for DTC check.
Clear DTC and pending DTC according to instructions displayed on scan tool. Refer to scan tool operator's manual for further details.
After completing the clearance, set ignition “OFF” and disconnect scan tool from DLC.

attention3.ptxt: DTC and freeze frame data stored in ECM memory are also cleared in the following case. Be careful not to clear them before keeping their record.

item.ptxt: When the same malfunction (DTC) is not detected again during 40 engine warm-up cycles. (See “Warm-Up Cycle” of OBD System Description .)
